## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change keeps schemas and examples domain-configurable.
- [ ] Missing enrichment still means unknown or not collected, not negative evidence.
- [ ] Private outreach state remains separate from public fact tables.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior, commands, schema, or release process changed.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check_release.py` passes, or any skipped gate is explained below.

## Notes

Mention migration concerns, skipped checks, or follow-up work.
